# 📊 Dataset (26)

Ready-to-train data that would've cost you months to collect and clean. Point your pipeline at it and start learning today.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

- [x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools](https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools) — ⭐ 137,041 · Code — This repository collects and documents system prompts, internal tools, and AI models from popular AI-powered development environments like GitHub Copilot and Cursor. It provides insights into the underlying mechanisms of various AI coding assistants.
- [Zie619/n8n-workflows](https://github.com/Zie619/n8n-workflows) — ⭐ 55,100 · `Python` · Data — A collection of over 4,000 pre-built n8n workflows covering 365 integrations, designed to automate various tasks and data flows. It provides a comprehensive set of examples and configurations for using the n8n automation platform.
- [hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset](https://github.com/hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset) — ⭐ 11,562 · `HTML` · Data — This repository provides a comprehensive fitness dataset containing information for 1,324 exercises, including animation GIFs, thumbnails, muscle group and equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in multiple languages. It serves as the data layer for the LogPress fitness application.
- [google-deepmind/mujoco\_menagerie](https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco_menagerie) — ⭐ 3,391 · `Python` · Robotics — This repository offers a curated collection of high-quality robot models for the MuJoCo physics engine, designed to support robotics research and simulation.
- [facebookresearch/uco3d](https://github.com/facebookresearch/uco3d) — ⭐ 1,326 · `Python` · 3D — A dataset featuring 170,000 turn-table videos of diverse everyday objects, designed to support 3D research and understanding.
- [google-deepmind/formal-conjectures](https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures) — ⭐ 980 · `Lean` · Science — This repository provides a collection of mathematical conjectures that have been formally stated and verified within the Lean proof assistant. It acts as a specialized dataset for research in formal mathematics, potentially for use with AI-assisted theorem proving systems.
- [amir32002/3D\_Street\_View](https://github.com/amir32002/3D_Street_View) — ⭐ 485 · 3D — This repository hosts a dataset comprising 25 million street view images, camera poses, and 3D city models. It was used in research for generic 3D representation via pose estimation and matching.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/HY3D-Bench](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY3D-Bench) — ⭐ 305 · `Python` · 3D — This repository contains HY3D-Bench, a comprehensive 3D dataset of 600,000 high-quality objects. It is designed for benchmarking and research in various 3D applications.
- [harveyai/harvey-labs](https://github.com/harveyai/harvey-labs) — ⭐ 298 · `Python` · Text — Harvey Labs provides a benchmark to evaluate and improve the capabilities of LLM agents in legal work. It assesses agent performance across a dataset of 1251 legal tasks.
- [DestinyLinker/MingLi-Bench](https://github.com/DestinyLinker/MingLi-Bench) — ⭐ 289 · `Python` · Text — MingLi-Bench is a benchmark to evaluate Large Language Models (LLMs) on complex traditional Chinese fortune-telling tasks, specifically Bazi and Ziwei Doushu.
- [FrontierCS/Frontier-CS](https://github.com/FrontierCS/Frontier-CS) — ⭐ 194 · `C++` · Science — This repository provides a benchmark specifically designed for evaluating large language models (LLMs) on open-ended computer science problems. It aims to explore the next frontier of computer science by assessing LLM capabilities in complex problem-solving.
- [onyx-dot-app/EnterpriseRAG-Bench](https://github.com/onyx-dot-app/EnterpriseRAG-Bench) — ⭐ 170 · Text — This repository provides a synthetic dataset and benchmark for evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. It is designed to test RAG performance on enterprise internal documents, assessing information retrieval and question-answering capabilities using diverse sources like Slack and Jira.
- [Tencent/VulnGym](https://github.com/Tencent/VulnGym) — ⭐ 128 · Security — VulnGym is a real-world, project-level vulnerability benchmark designed to evaluate the capability of white-box AI agents in discovering security flaws in codebases. It provides a dataset of security advisories and entry points derived from 38 actual projects.
- [vinvcn/mattpocock-skills-zh-CN](https://github.com/vinvcn/mattpocock-skills-zh-CN) — ⭐ 104 · `JavaScript` · Text — This repository offers a Simplified Chinese translation of Matt Pocock's "engineering skills" (likely prompts or guidelines) for AI coding agents, making them more accessible to Chinese-speaking users.
- [weikaih04/Synthetic-Detection-Segmentation-Grounding-Data](https://github.com/weikaih04/Synthetic-Detection-Segmentation-Grounding-Data) — ⭐ 47 · `Python` · Data — An accurate and densely-annotated synthetic dataset designed for training state-of-the-art object detectors, segmentors, and Grounding-VLMs.
- [ddlBoJack/MMAE](https://github.com/ddlBoJack/MMAE) — ⭐ 45 · `Python` · Audio — MMAE is presented as a massive multitask audio editing benchmark, designed for the comprehensive evaluation of AI models in speech and general audio editing.
- [pensarai/argus-validation-benchmarks](https://github.com/pensarai/argus-validation-benchmarks) — ⭐ 41 · `Python` · Security — A collection of 60 self-contained, Dockerized vulnerable web applications designed to benchmark and evaluate AI-powered penetration testing agents. It covers various modern tech stacks and diverse vulnerability classes.
- [alibaba-multimodal-industrial-ai/IndustryBench](https://github.com/alibaba-multimodal-industrial-ai/IndustryBench) — ⭐ 39 · `Python` · Text — This repository presents IndustryBench, a multi-lingual benchmark dataset for evaluating the industrial domain knowledge of large language models, featuring questions derived from industrial standards and product records.
- [matsuolab/multibanana](https://github.com/matsuolab/multibanana) — ⭐ 24 · `Python` · Image — MultiBanana is a challenging benchmark and associated dataset designed for evaluating multi-reference text-to-image generation models, presented at CVPR 2026.
- [AllenNeuralDynamics/openscope-community-predictive-processing](https://github.com/AllenNeuralDynamics/openscope-community-predictive-processing) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Science — This repository serves as a community hub for the OpenScope Predictive Processing project, providing a central location for contributions, documentation, and project tracking related to neuronal recordings and visual prediction tasks, with public data available for analysis.
- [QwenLM/Qwen-Image-Bench](https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-Image-Bench) — ⭐ 21 · `Python` · Data — This repository provides 'Qwen-Image-Bench', a benchmark dataset likely used for evaluating and validating the performance of image-related AI models, as indicated by its presence on Hugging Face and ModelScope datasets.
- [gaoyz1235/RealAppliance](https://github.com/gaoyz1235/RealAppliance) — ⭐ 20 · `Python` · Robotics — This repository provides the RealAppliance dataset, comprising 100 high-fidelity digital twins of real-world appliances. The dataset is designed to train AI models to reliably operate physical machines, leveraging realistic rendering and mechanism simulation.
- [meituan-longcat/VitaBench-2.0](https://github.com/meituan-longcat/VitaBench-2.0) — ⭐ 18 · `Python` · Data — VitaBench 2.0 is a benchmark dataset and evaluation suite designed to measure the ability of AI models to understand and align with human preferences, highlighting where current models fall short in avoiding 'preference errors'.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/PlanningBench](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/PlanningBench) — ⭐ 15 · Text — PlanningBench is a benchmark dataset designed by Tencent Hunyuan for rigorously evaluating the planning capabilities and reasoning skills of large language models.
- [taco-group/4KLSDB](https://github.com/taco-group/4KLSDB) — ⭐ 14 · `Python` · Image — This repository provides 4KLSDB, a large-scale native-4K dataset and benchmark designed for tasks related to image restoration and generation.
- [JaceThings/SF-Hello](https://github.com/JaceThings/SF-Hello) — ⭐ 11 · `Python` · Image — This repository contains Apple's iconic "Hello" lettering as SVG files, directly extracted from the official Figma design, making them available for design and development projects.
